articles.title: 8 best places in India for river rafting
articles.description: best places in India for river rafting

articles.title: AP cadre IAS officer A. Vani Prasad reallocated to Telangana cadre
Kerala CM blames successive Congress, BJP governments at Centre for India’s cooking gas crisis
articles.description: Pinarayi Vijayan says the Congress in 2006, and later the BJP, ‘capitulated to American imperialism’ by repeatedly rejecting proposed India-Iran gas pipeline

articles.title: Telangana Budget FY2026-27: Government announces Indiramma Family Life Insurance scheme, ₹5 lakh each to 1.15 crore families
articles.description: Deputy Chief Minister and Finance Minister Mallu Bhatti Vikramarka in his 2026-27 budget speech on Friday (March 20, 2026) announced the launch of the insurance scheme.

articles.title: Amid Hormuz crisis, is India looking for costlier energy supply alternatives?
articles.description: Amid Hormuz crisis is India looking for costlier energy supply alternatives

topStories.title: Quote of the day: American diplomat Henry Kissinger's word of wisdom on foreign policy — ‘A country that demands…’
topStories.description: Henry Kissinger, influential diplomat and advisor, founded Kissinger Associates post-government.

topStories.title: Man Walks Away With Just $605 After Robbing Six New York Banks In 5 Days
topStories.description: Gustavo DeJesus Torres, 33, robbed six New York banks in five days and made off with a grand total of just $605.

topStories.title: First US Oil Barrels From Emergency Release To Hit Market
topStories.description: The US is releasing 45 million barrels from its strategic reserves. This move aims to cool soaring gas prices ahead of the upcoming midterm elections.

topStories.title: PM Modi, President Murmu extend Id-ul-Fitr greetings
topStories.description: President Murmu urged all to resolve to promote unity and harmony in society and contribute to the nation’s progress

topStories.title: PM Modi, President Murmu, Rahul Gandhi, other leaders extend Eid ul-Fitr greetings, wish for harmony and happiness
topStories.description: Eid ul-Fitr is celebrated by Muslims following the end of the month-long, dawn-to-dusk fasting during Ramadan and falls on the first day of Shawwal, the tenth month of the Islamic calendar.

topStories.title: Aid flotilla for Cuba sets sail from Mexico
topStories.description: An aid flotilla from Mexico is sailing for Cuba as the country suffers under a tightening US fuel blockade.

topStories.title:
Assembly election LIVE: 116 candidates, including CM, Speaker, LoP file nominations in Assam
 till Friday
topStories.description: Assam Congress on Friday (March 20, 2026) released the fourth list of seven candidates, taking the total tally to 94 in the 126-seat Assembly elections.

topStories.title: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput
topStories.description: Anthropic submitted two sworn declarations to a California federal court late Friday afternoon, pushing back on the Pentagon's assertion that the AI company poses an "unacceptable risk to national security" and arguing that the government's case relies on technical misunderstandings and claims that were never actually raised during the months of negotiations.

topStories.title: US permits temporary sale of Iranian oil stranded at sea as crude tops $112 a barrel amid Middle East conflict
topStories.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said in a post on X that his department was issuing a temporary authorisation permitting the sale of the stranded Iranian oil.

topStories.title: SC grants bail to accused in Andhra Pradesh liquor case
topStories.description: The Supreme Court granted bail to Muppidi Avinash Reddy in the Andhra liquor case, citing completed interrogation and co-accused already granted bail.

topStories.title: New video shows Justin Timberlake struggling through sobriety tests during Hamptons stop
topStories.description: Newly released police body camera footage shows Justin Timberlake struggling through field sobriety tests during his 2024 DWI arrest in Sag Harbor.

topStories.title: Kansas man charged in unprovoked park stabbing that left woman critically injured
topStories.description: A Kansas man faces attempted murder charges after allegedly stabbing a woman in what police called an unprovoked park attack in Olathe, Kansas.

dailyNews.title: Kansas man charged in unprovoked park stabbing that left woman critically injured
dailyNews.description: A Kansas man faces attempted murder charges after allegedly stabbing a woman in what police called an unprovoked park attack in Olathe, Kansas.

dailyNews.title: Transgender golfer sues LPGA over policy that protects women's competitions
dailyNews.description: Transgender golfer Hailey Davidson has sued the LPGA, alleging its policy barring biological males who underwent male puberty from women's golf effectively bans all transgender women.

dailyNews.title: Live possum discovered hiding among plush toys in an Australian airport gift shop
dailyNews.description: A wild possum found a clever hiding spot among plush toys in an airport gift shop in Australia and was safely removed, staff confirmed.

dailyNews.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' star Nicholas Brendon dead at 54
dailyNews.description: Nicholas Brendon, who played Xander Harris on "Buffy the Vampire Slayer," died March 20 at age 54. His family says he died in his sleep of natural causes.

dailyNews.title: 'The View' argues whether Iran campaign is historic blunder like Iraq or will keep future Americans safe
dailyNews.description: CNBC's Sara Eisen argued on "The View" that Trump's Iran military operation will keep future Americans safe from a nuclear threat, but co-hosts pushed back.

dailyNews.title: Boxer Tyson Fury's dad, John Fury, reveals their relationship 'is destroyed'
dailyNews.description: John Fury said his relationship with his son, boxer Tyson Fury, was “destroyed," citing decisions on Oleksandr Usyk fights. He also criticized trainer SugarHill Steward.

dailyNews.title: Pilot claims Google Earth image may show Amelia Earhart's missing plane on Pacific island reef
dailyNews.description: A pilot says Google Earth satellite images of Nikumaroro Island may show Amelia Earhart's Lockheed Electra, missing since her 1937 around-the-world flight.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge rules Pentagon policy restricting press access unconstitutional, hands victory to New York Times
dailyNews.description: The New York Times is touting a victory after a federal judge ruled in its favor in a lawsuit against the Pentagon claiming its press policy violated the First and Fifth Amendments.

dailyNews.title: Joseph Duggar searched with hands against wall in booking video after child molestation arrest
dailyNews.description: Joseph Duggar's booking video is released after the former "19 Kids and Counting" star waived extradition. He faces child molestation charges in Florida.

dailyNews.title: California man paroled under ‘youthful offender’ provision for 2 murders kills again less than a year later
dailyNews.description: Darryl Lamar Collins, released early under a youthful offender law, was sentenced to life in prison for the brutal 2021 murder of Fatima Johnson, a mother of six.

dailyNews.title: American Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti thanks Trump for Army-Navy game executive order
dailyNews.description: American Athletic Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti praised President Donald Trump for signing an executive order to protect the Army-Navy game's exclusive broadcast window.

dailyNews.title: Rep Boebert rejects call for another $200 billion to fund Iran war, while Americans 'can’t afford to live'
dailyNews.description: Rep. Boebert warned the policies being enacted by the Trump administration are not putting Americans first, warning the GOP needs to change course before the midterms.

dailyNews.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani’s wife glorified terrorists in online posts, criticized US military: report
dailyNews.description: New York City first lady Rama Duwaji is facing backlash amid resurfaced posts that show her praising airplane hijackers and using racial slurs.

topStories.title: Denmark Was Ready to Blow Up Airfields to Stop a U.S. Invasion of Greenland
topStories.description: The Danes brought blood supplies, explosives and live ammunition to Greenland as part of contingency plans in case President Trump acted on his threats to seize the island.

topStories.title: Trump Friend Asked ICE to Detain the Mother of His Child
topStories.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

topStories.title: Trump calls NATO allies "cowards" as more Marines head toward Middle East
topStories.description: The Iran war reached the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials said.

topStories.title: Trump is strategizing means to seize Iran's nuclear stockpiles, sources say
topStories.description: The Trump administration has been strategizing methods and options to secure or extract Iran's nuclear materials, according to multiple sources, as the military campaign against Tehran enters a more uncertain phase.

topStories.title: Colombian President Petro caught up in narcotics trafficking probes, sources say
topStories.description: The separate narco-trafficking investigations, based out of New York's Southern and Eastern districts, didn't set out to target Petro, but his name has come up during the course of the probes, one source said.

topStories.title: Trump administration temporarily lifts sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
topStories.description: The U.S. Treasury has authorized the purchase of Iranian oil that's already at sea, exempting buyers from the tight sanctions that have restricted Iran's oil industry for years, as the Trump administration grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down how U.S. could undermine its own victory against Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is vowing to continue hitting Iran "very hard," even as he said the country's military is "finished." Mark Montgomery, senior fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: President Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

dailyNews.title: Father of service member killed in Iran war said he never told Pete Hegseth to 'finish' the job
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and President Donald Trump have said the families of service members who died in the Iran war told them to finish the job.

dailyNews.title: White House expands TrumpRx with three new drugs
dailyNews.description: The White House said Friday it’s adding three drugs for diabetes and lung disease to the self-pay platform TrumpRx, as the administration works to expand the site as part of its push to lower drug prices

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options for deploying possibly thousands of ground troops in Iran
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't want Iran war ceasefire, but is considering 'winding down' military ops
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, "will have to be guarded and policed, as necessary, by other Nations who use it."

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.

dailyNews.title: Trump: U.S. could end Iran military operations 'right now' but will continue so Iran can 'never rebuild'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's comments followed reports that the Pentagon is sending up to 2,500 more Marines to the Middle East from San Diego.
